question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/StreamFileListener.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: onEnd(T streamFile)] Can an unprivileged external user trigger a network partition between the importer and the database at the exact moment onEnd() is executing, causing the AbstractStreamFileParser.doFlush() to fail after streamFileListener.onEnd() completes but before last.set(streamFile) is called, resulting in the in-memory last pointer diverging from the persisted state and allowing duplicate or out-of-order stream file processing on reconnect?
